reason: mathlib convention: lemma ABOUT ConjClasses should be in the ConjClasses namespace (dot), not underscore-prefixed; general group-theory fact (mathlib candidate). Public API — Phase 5b. JUDGMENT: CLAUDE.md discourages sub-namespaces; orchestrator to decide vs leaving as project-internal Chebotarev.* name.
decision_reason: Orchestrator 2026-06-07: keep underscore names. Inside `namespace Chebotarev` a `ConjClasses.` rename does NOT enable dot-notation (head-symbol lookup resolves root `ConjClasses.*`, and the full name would be `Chebotarev.ConjClasses.*`), so the rename buys nothing locally and violates the CLAUDE.md no-sub-namespaces rule. The right move is the UP1 one: relocate these three generic group-theory lemmas to a root-namespace ForMathlib home (or a mathlib PR) where `ConjClasses.` is the real namespace. Tagged for UP1.
